title: Graph editor mutation APIs
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want mutation APIs over the graph so that I can fix bad extractions and edit brain data directly.
acceptanceCriteria: - update_episode_body(episode_id, new_body) — re-extract is async; old extracted facts get invalidated bi-temporally
- rename_entity(entity_id, new_name) — propagates to all references
- set_entity_attribute(entity_id, key, value) — direct attribute edit
- delete_entity(entity_id) — soft delete (hides from search; bi-temporal store keeps history)
- merge_entities(keep_id, merge_id) — moves edges from merge_id to keep_id; soft-deletes merge_id
Each mutation logs via the Task US-006 stderr pattern
If Graphiti REST does not expose a mutation directly, synthesize from primitives (e.g. merge_entities = enumerate edges + recreate on keeper + soft-delete)
Verify: each of the six mutations succeeds against a test entity and the change is visible via the matching read API on the next call
